title: Dataset Enumeration
description: Discover and catalog datasets to map the system's data landscape.

steps.title: LISTCAT Catalog Query
steps.screen:
LISTCAT ENTRIES('SYS1.**') NAME

SYS1.BRODCAST
SYS1.CMDLIB
SYS1.COBLIB
SYS1.HELP
SYS1.LINKLIB
SYS1.LPALIB
SYS1.MACLIB
SYS1.MANX
SYS1.PARMLIB
SYS1.PROCLIB
SYS1.SAMPLIB
steps.expected: Identify system datasets and understand the HLQ naming convention.
steps.hint: SYS1.* datasets are system libraries. PARMLIB contains system parameters, PROCLIB contains JCL procedures.
steps.assessment: Q5: Datasets ≠ files. The catalog is a namespace, not a directory tree.

steps.title: User Dataset Discovery
steps.screen:
LISTCAT ENTRIES('HERC01.**') ALL

HERC01.JCL.CNTL
  VOLSER: PUB001
  DEVTYPE: 3390
  CREATION: 2024.035
  EXPIRATION: 0000.000

HERC01.COBOL.SRC
  VOLSER: PUB001
  DEVTYPE: 3390
steps.expected: Map user datasets and understand volume placement.
steps.hint: The HLQ (HERC01) ties datasets to user identity. Volume serial identifies physical location.
steps.assessment: Q5: HLQ = identity binding. No home directories, just catalog entries.

steps.title: PDS Member List
steps.screen:
LISTDS 'SYS1.PROCLIB' MEMBERS

--MEMBERS--
ASMFCL
COBUCLG
FORTGCL
IEBCOPY
IEBGENER
IEFBR14
JES2
SMF
VTAM
steps.expected: Enumerate PDS members to discover JCL procedures and programs.
steps.hint: SYS1.PROCLIB contains cataloged procedures. Each member is a reusable JCL template.
steps.assessment: Q5: PDS members ≠ files in a directory. Members are named records in a dataset.

steps.title: VTAM Config Discovery
steps.screen:
LISTDS 'SYS1.VTAMLST' MEMBERS

--MEMBERS--
ATCCON00
ATCSTR00
ATCTCA00
APPL01
LOCAL

View APPL01 to see defined VTAM applications.
steps.expected: Locate VTAM configuration to enumerate network resources.
steps.hint: VTAM application definitions reveal APPLIDs that can be targeted.
steps.assessment: Q5: System configuration is in datasets, not config files in /etc.
